eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; Arizona; at 1:42 PM on JUL 10, 2026 Effective until 9:42 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. A safe Alert has been issued for Maricopa County. The Phoenix Police Department is looking for 55-year-old Dean Emerson. Dean is a white male 5 feet tall, 8 inches tall, 160 pounds, with brown eyes and black hair. Dean was last seen wearing an orange long sleeve shirt, black sweatpants, and black and white sneakers. Dean was last seen on 07/09/2026 at 2:00 P.M. on foot near North 59 Avenue and West Indian School Road. Dean suffers from a medical condition which may cause him to become lost or easily confused. Please call 911 with information. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
